create-proposal.description: Generate PandaDoc proposal and send follow-up email

tech-radar-complete.description: Handle Manus completion webhook for Tech Radar research - creates Google Doc, generates podcast, sends Telegram + email notifications

lead-ingest.description: Ingest leads from Google Sheet into Airtable with deduplication. Payload: {action: ingest, sheet_id: ...}

lead-funnel-report.description: Run lead funnel analytics report. Payload: {action: weekly} or {action: monthly}

lead-funnel-manus-complete.description: Handle Manus completion webhook for lead funnel AI insights. Payload: Manus webhook payload with action: manus_complete

lead-outreach.description: Create draft outreach emails in Outlook. Payload: {action: send, industry: ..., limit: N} or {action: test_auth}

investment-research-complete.description: Handle Manus completion webhook for monthly investment research - creates Google Doc, sends Telegram notification

manus-complete.description: Unified Manus webhook router. Manus only supports one global webhook — dispatches to the right handler (tech_radar or investment_research) based on which tracker sheet owns the task_id.
